message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant "store: SnsUserStore" as store

participant "«interface»: :LoadSnsUsersFromExternalSource" as externalInterface

note over externalInterface, externalInterface
multiple interactions in the externalSource to extract a list of SnsUserDTO
end note

store ->> externalInterface: 1 getListFromExternalModule(fileName)
externalInterface ->> store: 2 className = getClassName(fileName)
store ->> externalInterface: 3 dtoList = readFileFromExternalSource(fileName)
externalInterface ->> store: 4 create()
store ->> externalInterface: 5 return dtoList

externalInterface ->> store: :List<SnsUserDTO>
store ->> externalInterface: :List<SnsUserDTO>

@enduml
